rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Next.js route handlers follow the file-based routing pattern: a `route.ts` file in a directory matching the URL path segment.","scope":"src/app/api/auth"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Request body must be explicitly parsed with `await request.json()` before accessing fields, unlike Express which parses automatically.","scope":"src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Payload operations (user creation) are asynchronous and must be awaited; this pattern should be consistent across all route handlers.","scope":"Payload"}]}
